selection: Brightest 32,000 Gaia DR3 sources; positive parallax; parallax_over_error > 10; G-band photometry present
query: SELECT TOP 32000 source_id,ra,dec,parallax,phot_g_mean_mag,bp_rp FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source WHERE parallax > 0 AND parallax_over_error > 10 AND phot_g_mean_mag IS NOT NULL ORDER BY phot_g_mean_mag ASC
